official_title: A Phase 2 Study to Evaluate Safety and Efficacy of Teclistamab-, Talquetamab-, and JNJ-79635322-based Combination Regimens in Participants With Newly Diagnosed Transplant Eligible Multiple Myeloma

pmids.citation: Raab MS, Weinhold N, Kortum KM, Kronke J, Fenk R, Weisel K, Podola L, Bertsch U, Brobeil A, Mersi J, Huhn S, Arlinghaus R, Hundemer M, Bohl SR, Mai EK, Schub N, Waldschmidt J, Bassermann F, Muller-Tidow C, Heuck C, Sakabedoyan C, Khan J, Ershova E, Koster BD, Engelhardt M, Hanel M, Salwender H, Teipel R, Goldschmidt H, Einsele H, Rasche L; GMMG-HD10/DSMM-XX (MajesTEC-5) investigators. Teclistamab-based induction treatment in transplant-eligible, newly diagnosed multiple myeloma: a phase 2 trial. Nat Med. 2026 Jun 25. doi: 10.1038/s41591-026-04471-x. Online ahead of print.
